title: devcontainer effect provider really contains (enforcement:real, demonstrated)
description: The sir-devcontainer effect provider applies REAL OS-level containment: it runs the action inside a `docker run --network=none --read-only` jail. In contained mode with provider_enforcement=real, the kernel scores enforces. The sibling capture.json is generated by `sir provider verify-containment` from an ACTUAL contained run where network egress was blocked (network_blocked=true) — so enforces here is demonstrated, not declared.
